reviews.review_description:
I use Gratuii regularly in my work as Director of Creative & Immersive Therapies at The Drake Center, and it has become a meaningful tool in both clinical and personal settings.

What really sets this app apart—and what I absolutely love—is that it features only real beaches from around the world. There’s something incredibly powerful about experiencing real environments versus purely digital ones. I’ve found that this level of realism helps patients drop into the present moment much more naturally. And it’s in that state of presence where the body can truly relax and the nervous system can begin to regulate.

Another aspect I deeply appreciate is that the entire experience is centered around gratitude-based affirmations and meditations. Gratitude is something I actively work with in my patients, and having a platform that stays so focused and intentional with that theme makes it especially effective.

I also value the availability of multicultural and multi-religious experiences, all grounded in gratitude. In my honest opinion, gratitude is universal—it’s something that connects all of us regardless of background, belief system, or life experience.

Gratuii is also incredibly easy to use. The controls are simple and intuitive, which is essential in a clinical setting. Many of my patients are new to virtual reality, and this app makes the experience accessible without overwhelming them. Because of that, I feel confident recommending it for home use as well.

Overall, Gratuii is a beautifully simple yet powerful tool for supporting presence, relaxation, and nervous system regulation through immersive, gratitude-centered experiences.

With gratitude, 
Jacqueline Drake 
Director Of Creative & Immersive Therapies 
TheDrakeCenter net

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you for taking the time to write such a thoughtful and detailed review. It means so much to see Gratitui being used in a professional setting.

Your words on presence, real environments, and gratitude truly reflect what we hope to create. We’re so glad it feels accessible and supportive for your patients.

With gratitude,
The Gratitui Team

reviews.review_title: I needed some peace and I found it here
reviews.review_description: I find meditation to be very hard, especially when life is difficult. I needed an app that I could get lost in but still maintain a purpose of being present. This was the app. I got to explore places I have never been and come back to places I have. To sit and listen to the ocean, watch the waves come in and out, eased my heart and time seemed to be easier to be still. Can’t wait to see more of what this app can do. It’s has a vibe that I can’t put my finger on but feels so human ?  Thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing something so thoughtful. We’re really glad Gratitui could offer a moment of peace when it was needed.

reviews.review_description:
Being new to VR, I wasn't sure what to expect. But this app brought me the relaxation that I hoped it would. I needed to use the deck at first, but then after a few uses I could remove the deck and enjoy it for what it is - a relaxing and meditative experience. It feels like I'm on the beach, and it's so calming when things are stressful. 
I can't always make it to the beach, but I can make time to do this. Thanks for helping me to find my inner peace!

developer_response.body: We are thrilled you are receiving the relaxation and inner peace you need with Gratitui. This is exactly what we hope for, for each person in our community - to  destress and find peace in one of nature's oases. Thank you so much for your thoughtful words and taking the time. 🙏😊

reviews.review_title: Can I get a little help!
reviews.review_description: It took forever to download 😒.  Now although I can go into the game, it won't let me go any further than entering. I cannot choose any of the three options, no beach, no rituals no nothing for me! What could possibly have gone wrong here! UPDATE  After this comment I had the wonderful help from  the company to correct any issue. Which was awesome!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for updating your review, we truly appreciate it 💙
And we’re so glad it's working out for you to fully enjoy the experience.
Always here if you need anything along the way.

reviews.review_description: Are these reviews legit? You can have the exact same experience on YouTube VR but better. The locations literally look like you’re standing off the side of the road by the creek, there’s no depth and it’s extremely bland. Only 45 reviews, looks to me like you take the bad reviews down or refuse to post them. I LOVE VR, I love photorealistic apps like Brink etc. but this ain’t it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your perspective, we understand Gratitui may not be the right fit for everyone. All reviews remain visible, and feedback helps shape future updates.

reviews.review_title: Like nothing I have ever tried before
reviews.review_description: I am new to the VR world and I was impressed. This app made me relax right away. I liked that you had choices in the volume, what beach you want to see, and picking a meditation or just wave sounds. This app is wonderful for anyone looking to escape without having to travel. I felt at ease. Great work Gratitui!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this 💙
We’re so glad you felt that sense of ease right away. That’s exactly what we hope to create.
Being able to choose your beach, sound, and experience is such a personal journey, and we love that you're finding what works for you. 
Really appreciate you being here with us.

reviews.review_description: Its like you got your phone and it's in video. But 360 video hd my favorite places I like dusk costa Rica and surge Italy  and radiant Portuga in beaches because of the waves hitting the rocks feels like you want to get in the waterl and frost Canada has a waterfall just soothing

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this. What a beautiful way to describe the experience 🙏🏼💙

That feeling of being transported, even for a few minutes, is exactly why we created Gratitui. So glad it’s resonating with you.

reviews.review_description:
Very nice! Given the current limitations of the tech, and the fact I'm using this on a Quest 2, which isn't renowned for it's high end graphics capabilities, I think they did a really nice job here.  You could probably find similar 360 beach footage on YT (or wherever) for free.  But when you overlay the music, and the guided-meditations, it makes for a much more complete and enjoyable experience.  Being able to call up a beautiful beach on demand, to me, is nothing short of magic.  Gratitude to the devs, for making that possible.  :)

EDIT:  Came back to update after the beaches all became high-res - it was really nice before, but now it's absolutely stunning.  Every single beach is beyond beautiful.  And the newly added sun-deck feature is genius.  The one flaw previous was that, nice as the beaches were, you kind of felt  like you were floating above them. The sun-deck feature fixes this completely, and increases immersion massively.  Fantastic improvements - many thanks.  :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to update your review, that means a lot to us. We’re really glad the new high-resolution beaches and the sundeck helped deepen the sense of immersion. Appreciate you spending time on the beaches with Gratitui.

reviews.review_description: I really like this app. It is very relaxing. The 2 things I would change would be to add more places. But even more, I wish I could actual get a view of the ocean and beach from "sitting" on the sand instead of on a sundeck. Otherwise, it's one of my favorites.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this thoughtful review 🙏🏼💙

We’re really glad you’re finding it relaxing and honored Gratitui is one of your favorites. That means a lot.

More places are on the way and we hear you on the perspective. That “sitting on the sand” feeling is something we care deeply about and are continuing to explore.

Really appreciate you taking the time to share this.

reviews.review_description: I love being able to play music on the beach, and there are so many good choices! I mix and match different beaches and songs depending on how I'm feeling, and it's great for destressing and relaxing. Totally worth it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this beautiful note 🙏🏼💙

We love that you’re mixing and matching beaches and music to suit your mood. That's exactly what we intended. 

So glad it’s helping you unwind and de-stress… and really appreciate you being here with us.

reviews.review_description: Great for mindfulness but a few new beaches/ lakes or even national parks waterfalls would be great -that would be fantastic!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, we are so happy you are enjoying the mindfulness inherent in the Gratitui experience. Yes absolutely, great suggestions, we are on it with many more blue space/water experiences for you to enjoy, including all of the above. 🧘‍♀️🌴🌊

reviews.review_description: I did try the early access build which was great but this latest version is amazing.  Incredible new beaches and I really like the Deck features.  So gratiful to have this app. This will definitely be part of my daily regimen.

developer_response.body: Thank you for staying with us since the early access days, we really appreciate it. So glad you’re enjoying the new beaches and the deck features.

reviews.review_description:
I was hoping to relax, but having ADD and a bit of OCD I have found this app more of a nuisance than a tranquility. The sound of the waves is flat, you can't hear the niuanses of bubbles bursting nor gulls squawking in the distance. Also you feel like you are a dog on a beach because of how the camera is positioned. And the fact that each beach is a 30 to 40 sec looped recording really doesn't bode with me.
The candles and affirmation beads were just too much for me.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience, we truly appreciate it. 
Gratitui is designed as a quiet, stillness-first beach immersion. Because it’s real 360° footage, the camera viewpoint can sometimes feel slightly elevated, and the scenes are looped to keep the experience smooth in VR.

For the sound, we keep the audio natural to the moment, without heavy overlays — so some beaches will feel more minimal and spacious than others.

The candles and beads are optional, and they won’t be for everyone. Thank you for giving Gratitui a try.

reviews.review_description: I’m a psychologist and I was looking for a ‘calm place’ meditative app for use in my psychology practice (and to use myself). This app is excellent! It transports you multiple beautiful beach locations and accompanies the experience with music or guided meditation. You really feel that you are in these stunning, spiritual locations. There are options to practice gratitude meditation, too, which can really help with positive mental health. I highly recommend this powerful app.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this thoughtful review, Dr. Reid. It means a great deal to hear that Gratitui can support both personal practice and work in psychology. We’re grateful the beaches can offer a calm place when it’s needed.

reviews.review_description: Extreme Calm! Sitting on my bed in my cozy bedroom and getting to escape to a beach and see birds or waves in the dead of winter has been such a cool experience. I really appreciate the sundecks, it allows me to feel super grounded and really in the environment. My son (7) & daughter (9) have also loved using Gratitui to sit and be calm, even if it is just for a few minutes. Sounds, visuals and whole experience have been great!

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this, we’re so glad the beaches can offer a calm escape, especially in winter. Wonderful to hear the sundecks helped make the experience feel more grounded.

reviews.review_description: Didn’t expect to like this as much as I do. One of the most peaceful apps I’ve tried on Quest. The beaches look real because they are real, and that makes a big difference for me instead of stylized graphics. I’ve been using it for stress relief and sleep, and even a few minutes feels like a mental reset. The meditations are simple and easy to follow. Looking forward to the devs adding beaches over time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review. We’re so glad the real beaches and simple meditations are helping create a peaceful reset. More beaches coming over time.

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been using Gratitui consistently for a month now and it’s absolutely what I need to wind down at the end of the day. I’m an athlete and an artist, and with my super busy schedule, I was looking for something to help me take the break I need in the day to calm my mind, practice gratitude and meditate. The beach variety is superb depending the mood you are looking for and they are absolutely gorgeous. One of my favourites is Scotland. 
I will definitely be using Gratitui again and again as it has become a part of my routine and something I look forward to in my day! :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for the beautiful review. We’re really glad Gratitui can be part of your wind-down routine, and it’s great to hear you’re enjoying the Scotland beach too.

reviews.review_description: I was waking up with high cortisol and anxiety. Entering a beach instantly drops my shoulders. I notice a big difference in my day when I use the app in the morning or not. The beaches really are beautiful, and the meditations are a great addition to my morning routine. I feel grateful for gratitui, thank you for making this wonderful app.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a kind review. We’re really glad the beaches and meditations can help bring a calmer start to the day. Appreciate you spending mornings with Gratitui.

reviews.review_description:
I use this app every day for at least a few minutes. The chance to stand on a beach and look at the waves in a totally realistic environment is just amazing. They have a number of beaches to fit your mood including simple lake shores. 

Update:

The new Gratituity app has better control of your view, though the menu is harder to find and use. I really miss the original beaches. I don’t like the new ones that much. Unfortunately , that means I don’t use the  app that much anymore.

developer_response.body:
Hi Dennis — thank you for taking the time to share this update. We’re sorry the recent changes disrupted something that had become part of your daily routine.

Our intent with the recent update was to give users better control of their view and a higher-resolution variety of beach environments, while preserving the calm, real-world feel that defines Gratitui. Maintaining a sense of ease and familiarity is incredibly important to us.

We also want to share that several of the original beaches will be returning soon as free add-ons, so some familiar favourites aren’t gone for good.

We hope you’ll check back in as these updates roll out, and we genuinely appreciate you being part of the journey.

— The Gratitui Team

reviews.review_description: What a great app. Its so calm and relaxing. On my Quest 3 the resolution is so good, it feels like I am really there. Combined with the sounds of waves and running water, it is truly a great experience. Looking forward to even more beaches!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review. We’re so glad the beaches feel immersive and that you’re enjoying the ocean sounds. More beaches are on the way.

reviews.review_description: This is really good, really nice chilling on a beach buy i have a problem with one beach, when the developer went out capturing the videos they should have found a better area on the lake beach in Switzerland as right on the waters edge there is lots of rubbish plastic bags etc one orange plastic bag just stands out, if I was filming that I would have found a different location or cleared the rubbish away before I got my camera out, I gave 3 stars due to this but would have been 4 and 5 if there were more beaches as I dont thinks there is enough for £14.99

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
The Swiss shoreline features a wide variety of natural rock shapes, textures, and sea-worn leaves. The orange item floating on the water's edge is actually a leaf, though we completely understand how it could be perceived differently at a glance. Our aim is to share real, unfiltered shoreline environments as they exist in nature.

Gratitui is continuing to grow and evolve, and we’re grateful you took the time to share how this scene came across. Thoughtful feedback like yours helps us shape a better experience.

reviews.review_description: the view is very high off the ground. very sad and cannot get a refund? this is no better than the views people post on youtube for free.

developer_response.body:
Sorry it didn’t land for you. With 360° video, the camera can feel slightly elevated even when it’s placed very low — that’s why we created the sundecks for a more grounded view.
Refunds are handled by Meta directly via your Quest purchase history.

reviews.review_description: I'm looking to relax at the beach and I thought I found the right app. I come on and although its all live, I feel like I'm hovering over the beach. everything is blown up and sizing is not accurate AT ALL! I can only be a short distance from the water and cannot move around. very nice that they alow me to turn around but I also want to be able to move! I want to move closer to the water!  I'ts definitely not worth the $15. I found something more realistic for free.  I'm requesting a refund as soon as I write my review

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback—we’re sorry it didn’t meet your expectations, and we truly appreciate you trying Gratitui.

reviews.review_description: I use this app almost every day for relaxation. Would love more activities to do from the beach bag, maybe some instruments. And of course more beaches!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review, we’re really glad Gratitui has become part of your daily relaxation. We appreciate you sharing your thoughts, and more beaches are on the way.

reviews.review_description:
Love love love it bought tears to my eyes first time using it.
Relaxed on my decking in Iceland on a beach or Ireland and so many more exciting beaches to explore. I just love the meditation section as well its fantastic really is well worth the money ! X

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a heartfelt review. It means a lot to hear the beaches moved you like that. We’re so glad you’re enjoying the meditations and exploring places like Iceland and Ireland with Gratitui. We have added a new Mindfulness category of meditations, music options, and more beaches are coming.

reviews.review_description: My husband and I absolutely love this app. It has everything we love to do. From meditation to affirmation, and just loving sitting and listening to the sounds of the waves. Would love to see Nazare Waves added to this. The crashing of these waves would be a wonderful addition. Keep up the great work.

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate this, thank you for spending time with Gratitui.
We’re continuing to add new beaches and meditations. Nazare - wonderful suggestion, thank you.

reviews.review_description: Great great app! So relaxing and beautiful footage!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review, we’re so glad you’re enjoying Gratitui.

reviews.review_description: I've not yet checked out everything, but the quality has massively improved, and haven't seen  any pauses in the video loop like on the old version. It's overall much more complete and polished now, thanks!

developer_response.body: Amazing, we are thrilled you're enjoying the massive improvements. Thanks for taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_description: I really love this app, it helps me soo much to relax, I reached out with a problem I had & they responded immediately with a solution! Why can't all apps have this kind of customer service?!

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving this review, we’re so glad Gratitui has been helpful for you. Enjoy your time at the beach :)

reviews.review_title: Omg, this! New favourite app on meta.
reviews.review_description:
I was a little skeptical about the quality, having used Vr video before in meta, but these beaches are gorgeous and enhanced with great detail. I really loved the China and Portugal beaches, but then I tried Italy and got wave splashed in the face! Ok it's not real but I actually blinked when it happened 🤣 so that is now my top favourite beach to play. 
Great work in making this this app, thanks for making it!. 
Includes meditations, music and other modes. 
Well worth a try. Hopefully this app will continue to be developed, can't wait to see what they do next. Been needing something like this for a long time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful review. We love hearing that the waves felt real enough to make you blink, that’s the magic we hope for. So glad you’re enjoying the beaches and meditations.

reviews.review_description: Not bad. I'm hoping it develops further and offers night time beaches and maybe some Scottish stormy weather beaches? At the moment it's all too corny so I don't use much.

developer_response.body: We appreciate you taking the time to write your thoughts and suggestions.  We hear you and are working on night time and stormy. But please do check out the new update 3.3.2, Iceland is majestic and quite dramatic and there is a "peaceful" Scottish scene, it's Loch Ness. Fresh new design on the interface too.

reviews.review_title: Most relaxing app I've ever tried
reviews.review_description:
I've tried various  meditation apps,  but this one has relaxed me the most.    The variety of beaches and the interactive elements, especially the lighting of candles is soothing to me.   I could go on and on,  but I love the sound of the ocean.The various beaches. The music is perfect and I love the affirmations and even the fact that they have different spiritual ones too.

Love that is in development and will only get better.  With that in mind here are some suggestions:

Make a left handed option.
Have beaches of consistent resolution.
Have a night option, combine that with the lighting of candles would be heaven.
More meditation options around stress relief, focus, happiness, etc

Thanks again for this app. My list of suggestions is only because my love for this app as is has  inspired my imagination to make it even better but as it stands , it's still  in my opinion the best app for relaxation and I think others would love it too. 

Highly recommended.

Peace

Bob

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this review Bob. Enthusiasm like yours is invaluable for the team. Excellent suggestions. Please check out the new update for much higher and consistent resolution and some new countries. Wonderful new meditations coming very soon too. Really appreciated this thoughtful review and suggestions, grateful.

reviews.review_description: Been getting lousy sleeps lately. Got up today at 5 and turned on the TV and picked up my phone and seen the add.figured for 8 bucks i can't go wrong.this thing knocked me out for an hour and a half. Best money i ever spent

developer_response.body: We are so so happy Gratitui came to you in the right moment and brought you the sleep you needed. The sound of waves is soothing in so many ways. And many thanks for taking the time to write this review.

reviews.review_description:
I love this app (hence 5 stars), a beach in VR is my favorite use case for VR… I also love you can mix in music and adjust individual volumes.. there are 3 things that could do with some improvement however:

1: as all have said, the resolution could do with an increase, it’s not bad but with such lovely beaches the more the better, either by bigger file size or less beaches (the 1st 2 are by far the best anyway, the French ones unwatchable)

2: the hands need to disappear during viewing the beach, super distracting (also I’m a lefty but not a huge deal only right hand use)

3: the EQ  on the first beach (which is by far the best), is waaay off, far too much mid, far to little bass I’m a musician and the sound is hard to listen to, pretty  easy to fix 

It’s early access, I’m confident these will be fixed in time and this will be my most used experience, love that 1st beach so much… and with the music added (which I found surprisingly relaxing!)

developer_response.body:
Yay! Thank you so much, we love that you love Gratitui as is. And truly appreciate your constructive remarks! You’re right to be confident! Our team is relentless and dedicated to ensuring the tweaks are tweaked, new features are bang on, quality is A+ and providing you with a world-class experience. 

So grateful for your support with this review!

reviews.review_title: Love the Waves and Customization Options
reviews.review_description: I love all of the beautiful beaches and listening to the waves, it is very relaxing to me.  I also really appreciate how many customization options there are to both change up the experience as I see fit.  Really liking this app!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this lovely review. We appreciate your thoughts and so glad you are enjoying the options included in the experience. Lots more coming too :) !!

reviews.review_title: A beach away from the beach
reviews.review_description:
I love the beach... I used to live within walking distance of a beach, and would walk there, and just look at the ocean and watch the waves. But now I'm lucky to get to a beach once a year... until this app!

This is a great example of a using VR to re-create something useful. 

Like others have mentioned, improved resolution would be welcome (I'd be OK with fewer beaches at a higher resolution). 3D video does use a lot of space (since you aren't looking at most of the image). However, it's good enough that I feel it is worth a 5-star rating. It of course is not quite the same as actually being at a beach, but it's the next best thing!

developer_response.body: We love the beach too, obviously! It’s a happy place for many of us and often not in the cards to visit in person for long stretches of time. Reading your account that Gratitui is the next best thing is truly heartwarming. We are making breakthrough strides with resolution in the headset that we know you will appreciate. Thank you for your support and letting others know the experience is working for you!

reviews.review_description: Very enjoyable.  Pick a beach and relax or meditate. I have been using this daily.  Highly recommend.

developer_response.body: Wonderful! The team is so excited to share even more beaches and meditation options (and more) for you to enjoy daily! Many thanks for taking the time to write this review, it's very helpful.

reviews.review_description: I loved using this app after a long day of work to relax by the beach! The graphics were amazing and the sound effects of the waves crashing onto the shore were very immersive. I will be using Gratitui every night before bed to relax and unwind. A great early Christmas present!

developer_response.body: We are thrilled that you are feeling relaxed after work spending some time at the beach! Thank you so much for writing this review for others to see. We’d love to hear more about your experience as you continue to use the app and we continue to add features!

reviews.review_description: I really love the idea of being able to sit on a beach in VR and I really wanted to like this app, but sadly, the resolution isn't great, and you can't adjust the scale of the view you're looking at, you can look around by turning your head but the view is too close and too big, if that makes sense. I'm a bit disappointed in having spent £6 on it. If the video clarity and scale could be improved, then the app would be great.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this feedback and supporting our early access app with your purchase. We are on it! Happily, the next update includes increased video quality with a slightly increased file size. Also, added gratitude meditations and the "5 Minute Fix", for a quick guided get away. Right now, yes, you are exactly positioned where the 360˚ camera is positioned on the beach. Offering options and scaling for viewing is a good idea and in line with our direction. Exciting and interactive features are also being added over the next while. Your comments are appreciated and will be reviewed by the team as the evolution continues. Stay tuned for updates!

reviews.review_title: Bring the beach to your living room
reviews.review_description:
A unique app idea that allows you to experience the calm of a variety of beaches around the world in 360°. 

Gratitui unlocks the serenity of the beach and nature. The addition of gratitude meditations is an interesting mindfulness coupling with the beaches I hope to explore more. 

Excited to keep visiting beaches and finding some calm in my daily life with this app!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this eloquent description! We are thrilled you are enjoying the app and visiting beaches from the comfort of your living room! 

Have fun exploring the gratitude and mindfulness meditations and practices. They are expertly designed to foster a feeling of gratitude which is proven to offer cognitive, social, mental, emotional and physical benefits. Thank you so much for taking the time to write this review!

reviews.review_description: It's a nice idea to offer beautiful places to relax or meditate. The app is designed to be very clear and user-friendly. Unfortunately, the videos from the locations are of poor graphic quality, so I don't feel like I'm in the middle of it all. I would like the videos to be offered in better quality. The app doesn't make sense to me because I don't get that immersive feeling that the virtual reality world represents for me.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. So glad you think it’s a nice app and find it clear and user-friendly. Happy to say the 360˚ video quality of the beaches will improve with the next update. We’re finding the balance to keep file size manageable. All shot in 4K or higher. Graphics are only used for the menus. You can turn off the menu by clicking the inside button of the right controller, to feel that beach immersion further. I hope that helps. More beach locations and features coming with updates too.

reviews.review_description: Poorest quality videos and no 3D..

developer_response.body: We have found our groove and are now offering only high resolution quality beaches, if you're interested in checking out the newest update. The beaches are for immersion in real 360˚ video captures for relaxation/meditation and stress reduction. They are not 3D. We're sorry it wasn't what you were expecting.

reviews.review_description: I love this watching the sea it's brilliant and beautiful

developer_response.body: We are so grateful for your validation!! It means more than you know. The sea is truly magnificent and we are overjoyed you are loving this experience. Thank you for taking the time to write a review for others to "sea" ;). The team is working hard to bring you even more.

reviews.review_description:
I am new to meditation and find it hard to focus and honestly, I just don't know what I should be doing/saying or thinking.  With this app - it is a guide for me and provides the Mantras and Gratitudes so that I can ease into the practice while sitting on a beach watching the waves.      I am using the 5 minute fix option right now and finding it useful- love the Mantra picked for me for the session.   Looking forward to the evolution of this app.

The beach quality is perfectly fine for me.

developer_response.body:
Wow, your words bring us IMMENSE joy. Thanks for all your honesty. Love that you love it!!!

Gratitude is exactly that for many of us! - an easy entry into mindfulness practice. Sounds like you’re doing all the things! 

Keep it up and we’d LOVE to hear from you again as we continue to refine and add more content. hello@gratitui.com

Thanks for the note about the beach quality being perfectly fine for you :) awesome.

reviews.review_description:
I love the variety of beaches, and they all have their own individual charm that makes relaxing a little adventure! I especially love the sounds, being able to choose between various ocean waves and lakeside splashes.
Are there going to be updates with new beaches in the future? If so I look forward to seeing them!!

developer_response.body: Awesome! We love that you love the variety of beaches and variety of relaxing sounds each can offer. You bet! More and more and more beaches are coming your way! Thank you for taking the time to write a review, it’s very very gratifying for the Gratitui team!

reviews.review_description: Serenity VR Meditation and Affirmation App offers an unparalleled escape to breathtaking beaches through the magic of virtual reality, providing an authentic sensory experience that transports users to a realm of tranquility. With its diverse selection of real footage and attention to detail, from the gentle lapping of waves to the warmth of the sun, the app creates an immersive sanctuary for relaxation and self-discovery. Guided meditation sessions and affirmations foster mindfulness and reduce stress, leaving users rejuvenated and centered after each session. Serenity VR is a gem in the realm of virtual reality experiences, offering a transformative journey to serenity and profound connection with oneself and the world.

I absolutely love this app for meditation and breath work. As someone with chronic stress and also someone who loves a good vacay, I really appreciate the tranquil beach experience. The ocean sounds are so peaceful and the transportation to my happy place is alarmingly realistic. I love that there are options for different beaches so that I can sit in a new destination each time. The guided meditations are so peaceful. Pro tip: turn on your fireplace if you miss the heat of the beach! Highly recommend.

developer_response.body: We are thrilled that you love the app, the beaches and the relaxation! Thank you for your review and the pro tip :) very grateful.
